statement: In every magma, Equation 1111 (`x = y * ((y * (x * x)) * z)`) implies Equation 3057 (`x = (((x * x) * y) * x) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0718
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op y (op x x)) z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op (op x x) y) x) z)
